name: Sales Order Processing
description: Batch processing for SOP documents — progress quotes through proformas, orders, deliveries, and invoices. Replicates Opera's batch progression.

accounting_system.description: Full SOP table access — reads config from iparm, writes document progressions

config_description: All SOP configuration is read directly from Opera's iparm table — no local settings needed. Key parameters: ip_delivry (delivery enabled), ip_updst (stock update stage), ip_cnor2in (skip delivery), sequence counters.

locking_rules.sequence_allocation: UPDLOCK, ROWLOCK on iparm and nextid when allocating document numbers
locking_rules.document_update: ROWLOCK on ihead, itran when progressing documents
locking_rules.balance_update: ROWLOCK on sname when updating order balance
locking_rules.stock_update: ROWLOCK on cname, cstwh when updating stock flags
locking_rules.concurrency: Each document progressed in its own transaction with deadlock retry
